tasks.title: [holoshell][clinic] Build Slow Computer Clinic room
tasks.description: Evidence: slow-computer clinic run produced risk=warn with 503 processes, 47 shell/dev runs, 25 stale runs, 21 owner handoff plans, and 4 actionable cleanup candidates. Affected repo/path: HoloLand apps/holoshell/source/holoshell-process-health-room.hsplus, apps/holoshell/prototype/local-capability-room.html, and new experiment source under experiments/holoshell-human-os-frontier. Expected: non-developer room separates hardware vitals, owner handoff, cleanup candidates, guarded stop plans, and replay receipts. Category: HoloLand product gap / HoloShell hardware-wrapper gap / deterministic UX receipt gap.

tasks.title: [holoshell][process] Add after-action remediation receipt
tasks.description: Evidence: process-health currently stages guarded stop plans, but the slow-computer clinic needs a reusable after-action receipt for approved remediation: exact PID, owner lane, reason, pre/post process visibility, memory delta, command redaction, and rollback/compensating note. Affected repo/path: HoloScript process/receipt primitives and HoloLand scripts/holoshell-process-health.mjs. Expected: approved stop/cleanup actions emit deterministic after-action verification receipts before marking the clinic step verified. Category: HoloScript substrate gap / deterministic UX receipt gap.

tasks.title: [holomesh][board] Recover task closure path from 502s
tasks.description: Evidence: while closing HoloShell tasks task_1778911460647_u5df and task_1778911460648_zqwf, GET /board and PATCH /board/:taskId returned 502 Application failed to respond; MCP board transport was also closed. Expected: HoloShell can close tasks with verification evidence or gets a durable queued close receipt. Category: multi-agent coordination gap / deterministic UX receipt gap.

tasks.title: [holoshell][clinic] Wire production after-action stop receipts
tasks.description: Evidence: fixture remediation receipt .bench-logs/holoshell-human-os-frontier/2026-05-16/slow-computer-remediation-fixture-receipt.json proves exact-PID stop, approval, and before/after visibility can be deterministic for a disposable process. Expected: production HoloShell stop plans reuse the same contract with a real human approval gesture, owner-lane acknowledgement when applicable, exact PID re-check immediately before stop, and after-action verification before marking remediation complete. Category: HoloShell hardware-wrapper gap / deterministic UX receipt gap.

tasks.title: [holoshell][clinic] Connect dry-run stop readiness to UI approval
tasks.description: Evidence: production-safe dry-run adapter experiments/holoshell-human-os-frontier/slow-computer-clinic-guarded-stop-dry-run.mjs records exact PID re-check, approval token, owner acknowledgement state, and terminationPerformed=false. Expected: HoloShell UI can turn this receipt into a real human gesture approval and then require a second immediate PID re-check before any stop. Category: HoloLand product gap / deterministic UX receipt gap.
